title: Tether Increases Holdings in Bitdeer to 21%
text: Tether, the issuer of the USDT stablecoin, increased its stake in bitcoin miner Bitdeer to 21% according to SEC filings. This significant investment represents Tether's confidence in Bitdeer's growth trajectory and strategic positioning in the crypto mining and AI infrastructure sectors. Tether's investment demonstrates institutional backing for Bitdeer's expansion plans, particularly its ambitious AI data center projects like the Tydal facility in Norway. The stake was further increased when Tether exercised warrants in May 2025, issuing 5,186,627 ordinary shares and receiving $50 million in cash proceeds. This additional capital injection supports Bitdeer's expansion toward achieving over 40 EH/s self-mining capacity and developing major infrastructure projects. Tether's substantial ownership position aligns the two companies' interests as they pursue growth in Bitcoin mining and AI computing infrastructure.
